_README: MmapGen per-map / per-tile generator config. Top-level keys are stringified map IDs; values for that map are flat scalars (agentRadius, agentHeight, walkableRadius, walkableHeight, walkableSlopeAngle, etc.). Per-tile overrides go in nested objects under the map (the inner key is `tileX || tileY`, no separator). The `default` block at the top is read by tools/NavDataAudit only -- MmapGen itself ignores it. See docs/physics/MMAP_FORMAT.md.
_agentNotes: Tauren Male is the largest WoW capsule (radius 1.0247, height 2.625). All continent maps must be generated for that capsule. agentRadius / agentHeight are in WoW meters. walkableRadius is in Recast cells with cs=BASE_UNIT_DIM (0.2666666m); walkableRadius=4 covers 1.066m. walkableHeight and walkableClimb were previously specified as integer cell counts tied to ch=0.25 — that's a footgun when ch changes (PFS-OVERHAUL-006: setting them to 0 lets TileWorker auto-derive cell counts from agentHeight/agentMaxClimbModelTerrainTransition divided by ch, producing correct world-unit clearance / climb regardless of ch).
